items.title: Eyebrows were raised when the Pistons acted swiftly to sign Tobias Harris as a free agent when Trajan Langdon and J.B. Bickerstaff first arrived. He validated every dollar the Pistons offered - and then some.
items.author: Keith Langlois
items.body_excerpt:
Eyebrows were raised when the Pistons acted swiftly to sign Tobias Harris as a free agent when Trajan Langdon and J.B. Bickerstaff first arrived. He validated every dollar the Pistons offered - and then some.

www.nba.com/pistons/news...

media.title: Pistons 2025-26 Rewind: Harris validated decision to lure him back to Detroit
media.description: Harris, who signed a two-year contract with the Pistons in 2024 as a free agent, will be an unrestricted free agent as free agency opens next week.
